phases.name: mod
phases.prompt: Write a 'go.mod' file for a small command-line greeting tool. Use the module path 'example.com/greet' and a recent Go version (e.g. go 1.22). Output ONLY the complete contents of go.mod inside a single ```go code block, nothing else.

phases.name: greet
main
test

scorers.rubric: greet_test.go is a valid Go test in package main that exercises Greet for both a named and an empty input and asserts the expected greeting strings.
